Enum Class WorkBatch.Parity

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<WorkBatch.Parity>
com.github.mrgarbagegamer.WorkBatch.Parity
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<WorkBatch.Parity>, Constable
Enclosing class:
WorkBatch
public static enum WorkBatch.Parity extends Enum<WorkBatch.Parity>
An enum representing the parity of a combination's prefix, which determines whether the final click should be chosen from the set of indices adjacent (ODD) or not-adjacent (EVEN) to the first true cell in the grid.

This enum encapsulates the logic for selecting the correct final click array. It improves type safety and reduces memory usage per WorkItem by holding references to the final click arrays and start index lookup tables, which are pulled from StartYourMonkeys.GlobalConfig at class load time.

Since:
2025.12 - Parity Enum Refactor
Performance Characteristics:
O(1) access to final clicks and start indices.
Threading Model:
Thread-safe as enum constants.
Memory Management:
Fixed memory footprint per enum constant.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    EVEN
    Represents an even-parity prefix, requiring a final click from the odd-indexed array.
    ODD
    Represents an odd-parity prefix, requiring a final click from the even-indexed array.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final short[]
    finalClicks
    A reference to the pre-computed array of final click indices associated with this parity, pulled from StartYourMonkeys.GlobalConfig.
    private final int[]
    startIndices
    A reference to the pre-computed start index lookup table associated with this parity, pulled from StartYourMonkeys.GlobalConfig.

  • Constructor Details

    • Parity

      private Parity(Supplier<short[]> clicksSupplier, Supplier<int[]> indicesSupplier)
      Constructs a Parity enum constant, loading its arrays from the provided suppliers, which should point to StartYourMonkeys.GlobalConfig.
      Parameters:
      clicksSupplier - A Supplier for the array of final click indices.
      indicesSupplier - A Supplier for the start index lookup table.
      Since:
      2025.12 - Parity Enum Refactor
      Performance Characteristics:
      O(1) construction.
      Threading Model:
      Thread-safe during enum initialization.
      Memory Management:
      Does not allocate, apart from the enum constant itself.

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static WorkBatch.Parity[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static WorkBatch.Parity valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • getFinalClicks

      public short[] getFinalClicks()
      Returns the array of final click indices associated with this parity.
      Returns:
      The short[] array of final clicks.
      Since:
      2025.12 - Parity Enum Refactor
      Performance Characteristics:
      O(1) access.
      Threading Model:
      Thread-safe.
      Memory Management:
      Does not allocate; returns reference to existing array.

    • getStartIndex

      public int getStartIndex(int lastPrefixClick)
      Returns the pre-calculated starting index within the final clicks array for a given last prefix click.
      Parameters:
      lastPrefixClick - The last (highest) click in the prefix.
      Returns:
      The starting index for the final click search.
      Since:
      2025.12 - Parity Enum Refactor
      Performance Characteristics:
      O(1) lookup.
      Threading Model:
      Thread-safe.
      Memory Management:
      Does not allocate.

    • isOdd

      public boolean isOdd()
      Checks if this parity is odd.
      Returns:
      true if this is ODD, false otherwise.
      Since:
      2025.12 - Parity Enum Refactor
      Performance Characteristics:
      O(1) comparison.
      Threading Model:
      Thread-safe.
      Memory Management:
      Does not allocate.

    • fromBoolean

      public static WorkBatch.Parity fromBoolean(boolean isOdd)
      Converts a boolean indicating oddness into the corresponding Parity enum.

      Returns:

      Since:

Performance-optimized brute-force solver for hexagonal grid Lights Out puzzles
